message:
feat(fnp-python): port trim_zeros to native Rust with conformance harness

- Uses native UFuncArray.trim_zeros_mode() for ndarray inputs
- Falls back to NumPy for list/tuple to preserve return type
- Adds normalize_trim_zeros_mode() for case-insensitive mode handling
- Conformance harness: 5 tests, 89 cases across all trim modes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
